steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage ends by naming the core problem: inconsistent definitions of urban settlements across countries make it difficult to compare urbanization research. The correct answer must capture that comparison problem.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'comparison is difficult when countries define urban settlements differently': Matches the passage's final sentence and the argument it builds throughout. ✓
  • Choice B — 'misrepresents the definitions': Contradicts or distorts what the passage actually says the definitions are. ✗
  • Choice C — 'adds unsupported details': Introduces information not present in the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — 'contradicts the passage': States something the passage directly argues against. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
